mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user ORDER BY user_id DESC
SELECT * FROM user WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY user_id DESC
SELECT * FROM staff ORDER BY staff_id DESC
SELECT * FROM staff WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY staff_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO staff (name, password, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{password}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET stock = #{stock} WHERE id = #{id}
